description: Make stagehand automatically deliver the experiment design principles (jarvis PR #98, docs/experiment-design-principles.md) to any user. Audit of 6 experiment repos found lineage and idempotence weak everywhere (0/6 strong) even though stagehand has an artifacts service — because repos use stagehand as a monitoring wrapper, not the execution/artifact path. Strategy: make stagehand own the step execution + artifact write path, and make that the laziest path. Three automatable principles: lineage (auto run-manifest), idempotence (content-keyed step memoization), cheap-first (engine smoke mode). Validate ergonomics with a pilot port of sdf-hallucination's eval chain.
title: Bake experiment design principles into stagehand
